configuration.tools: Read the exact frozen runtime and assigned worker-visible fixture; write only the assigned capture. All tracker, Git, worktree, remote, publication, installation, and destructive operations remained simulated.
unavailable_telemetry: Exact backend build and sampling seed were not exposed.
Token counts and latency were not exposed.
Workers did not echo model and reasoning identities; dispatch records supply the fixed configuration.

protocol_deviations.observation: The worker reported running a read-only git diff --check after writing its capture.
protocol_deviations.disposition: decision-neutral; it did not expose the evaluator fixture, candidate conclusions, prior or peer outputs, did not mutate state, and did not alter the completed capture

protocol_deviations.observation: Root mechanically removed Markdown hard-break trailing spaces after scoring so repository validation would accept the captures.
protocol_deviations.disposition: decision-neutral; only trailing spaces changed, semantic text and root scores were unchanged, and the manifest records the normalized final capture identities

ordinary.worst: O-01, O-02, and O-03 each satisfied 5/5 criteria.

high-risk.worst: H-01 and H-02 each satisfied 5/5 criteria.

protected_behavior.compatibility: K-01 through K-08 passed at their registered exact-reusable or lane-limited boundary after identity read-back.
protected_behavior.relationships: All eight owner, trigger, and Return rows passed; ordinary and high-risk route facts and wrong-route exclusions received fresh behavioral proof.
protected_behavior.authority: Fresh samples preserved caller admission, root review and Repair ownership, reviewer no-mutation authority, helper non-authority, and successor proof/review boundaries.

h1_contribution.claim: none; H1 is byte-identical to M0

v1.reason: Every M0 unit and protected compatibility and relationship lane passed; no H1 unit exists.

proof.full_pytest: 206 passed, 4 skipped after final behavior-complete bytes
proof.diff_checks: git diff --check and git diff --cached --check passed

residual_transfer_gaps: Fixtures simulate provider and Git observations; no live tracker, connector partial failure, remote publication, or irreversible closeout ran.
Worktree containment does not establish process, credential, network, cache, submodule, or scarce-resource isolation.
Results remain bounded to the frozen bytes, fixtures, model, host, reasoning configuration, tools, and five samples.
The O-03 post-capture read-only diff check and root-only trailing-space normalization of O-02/O-03 are recorded decision-neutral protocol deviations.
